#cloud-config
# Ubuntu 24.04 Autoinstall - generated by rack-director
# OS: Ubuntu 24.04
# Device: 550e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-44665544c014
autoinstall:
  version: 1
  identity:
    hostname: node-44665544c014
    username: ubuntu
    password: "!"
  network:
    network:
      version: 2
      ethernets:
        primary:
          match:
            macaddress: "52:54:00:c0:02:04"
          addresses:
            - "127.0.0.100/8"
          routes:
            - to: default
              via: 127.0.0.1
          nameservers:
            addresses: [8.8.8.8]
  storage:
    layout:
      name: custom
    config:
      - id: part-efi
        type: partition
        device: /dev/disk/by-path/pci-0000:00:1f.2-ata-1
        preserve: true
      - id: fmt-efi
        type: format
        volume: part-efi
        fstype: vfat
        preserve: true
      - id: mnt-efi
        type: mount
        device: fmt-efi
        path: /boot/efi
      - id: part-boot
        type: partition
        device: /dev/disk/by-path/pci-0000:00:1f.2-ata-1
        preserve: true
      - id: fmt-boot
        type: format
        volume: part-boot
        fstype: ext4
        preserve: true
      - id: mnt-boot
        type: mount
        device: fmt-boot
        path: /boot
      - id: part-lvm
        type: partition
        device: /dev/disk/by-path/pci-0000:00:1f.2-ata-1
        preserve: true
      - id: lv-root
        type: lvm_partition
        volgroup: ubuntu-vg
        preserve: true
      - id: fmt-lv-root
        type: format
        volume: lv-root
        fstype: ext4
      - id: mnt-lv-root
        type: mount
        device: fmt-lv-root
        path: /
  packages:
    - openssh-server
  late-commands:
    - echo "rack-director-provisioned" > /target/etc/rack-director
